summary: Code review of Fase 3 modularization completed. VERIFIED: All 3 page modules (map, stock, reports) now use typed functions instead of exec(). Router correctly delegates to modules. BLOCKER: PostgreSQL database unavailable (localhost:5432 connection refused) prevents dynamic UI testing.

critical.issue: PostgreSQL not running on localhost:5432 - app fails at startup with connection refused

issues: Deprecation warning: use_container_width=True should be replaced with width='stretch' (deadline 2025-12-31)
Dead code: Lines 1676-2649 (old Map code), 2651-3093 (old Stock code), 3511+ (old Reports code) are unreachable after router's st.stop() calls

feature_1_no_exec_in_modules.description: No exec() usage found in any of the 3 page modules
feature_1_no_exec_in_modules.evidence: grep -n 'exec' found only 'execute' string in user-facing message, not exec() function

feature_2_typed_functions.description: All 3 modules define run_*_page(ctx: dict) typed functions
details: map_page.py: def run_map_page(ctx: dict) - uses globals().update(ctx)
stock_page.py: def run_stock_page(ctx: dict) - uses globals().update(ctx)
reports_page.py: def run_reports_page(ctx: dict) - uses explicit ctx unpacking

feature_3_router_intact.description: Router in app.py correctly calls modular functions
details: Line 1657-1659: if aba == 'Mapa dos Contentores': run_map_page({**globals(), **locals()}); st.stop()
Line 1661-1663: if aba == 'Ver Stock': run_stock_page({**globals(), **locals()}); st.stop()

feature_4_syntax_valid.description: All 3 module files pass Python AST syntax validation

critical_code_review_comments: Fase 3 modularization COMPLETE - exec() replaced with typed functions
Two different context injection patterns used: globals().update(ctx) vs explicit unpacking - consider standardizing
CLEANUP NEEDED: ~2000 lines of dead code remain in app.py (old inline implementations for Map, Stock, Reports) after router section
reports_page.py is cleanest implementation - explicitly declares all dependencies from ctx
action_items: BLOCKER: PostgreSQL database still not available - dynamic UI testing not possible
CLEANUP: Remove dead code in app.py (lines 1676-3093 and related) after confirming modules work with database
MINOR: Replace use_container_width=True with width='stretch' across all files
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fase 3 modularization code review PASSED. All 3 page modules (map_page.py, stock_page.py, reports_page.py) use typed run_*_page(ctx: dict) functions instead of exec(). Router in app.py correctly imports and delegates. PostgreSQL database still unavailable (localhost:5432 connection refused). Dynamic testing requires database. Dead code cleanup pending confirmation.
rca_of_issue: Environment blocker: PostgreSQL service not running. App uses psycopg2 connection pool at startup that fails when database unavailable, causing st.stop() at line 136 before UI loads.
